name: call_ext_reviewer
description: Call external LLM API as reviewer for grounded-review scoring. Supports OpenAI-compatible APIs (including custom base_url) and Gemini APIs. Returns structured JSON with rubric scores, verdict, and repair actions. This tool is used when one-report is invoked with reviewer_api_config.

api_key.description: API key for authentication (can also use api_key_env for env var name)

api_key_env.description: Environment variable name containing the API key (alternative to api_key)

base_url.description: API base URL (optional, defaults to official endpoints)

temperature.description: Temperature for generation (0.0-1.0, recommend 0.1-0.3 for review tasks)

system_prompt.description: The reviewer system prompt defining the role and scoring rubric

user_prompt.description: The user prompt containing the report content to review and scoring instructions
